bird.name: Pauraque
bird.summary: The pauraque (Nyctidromus albicollis) – also called the common pauraque to distinguish it from similar species – is a nightjar species, one…

locations.name: 新大陸
locations.summary: 新大陸（拉丁語：Mundus novus），或譯為新世界，是歐洲人於15世紀末發現美洲大陸及鄰近群島後對這片新土地的稱呼。相對概念為亚欧非大陆等「旧大陆」。 词源 “新世界”（Mundus Novus）一词最初是在亚美利哥·韦斯普奇于15…

locations.name: 恩特雷里奥斯省
locations.summary: Entre Ríos (Spanish pronunciation: [ˈentɾe ˈri.os], 'Between Rivers') is a central province of Argentina, located in th…

locations.name: 亞瓜龍河
locations.summary: 亞瓜龍河是南美洲的河流，發源自巴西南部，流經南里奧格蘭德州和與烏拉圭接壤的邊境，河道全長270公里，流域面積約3,000平方公里。

relations.subject: Pauraque
relations.evidence: It breeds in the subtropical and tropical regions of the New World, and except for northernmost birds it is largely resident all year round

relations.subject: Pauraque
relations.evidence: For example, it is not recorded to breed in Entre Ríos Province (Argentina) and it is scarce in Rio Grande do Sul (Brazil); about its presence in Uruguay likewise little is known, except that a population of some size is found along the Yaguarón River in the Cuchilla de Mangrullo region. thumb|left|The two pinkish eggs of the pauraque are laid directly on the ground or leaf litter.|alt=Two splotched pinkish eggs rest on dead leaves on the ground. It is found in open woodland/grassland habitats, but also scrubland and crop fields

relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: Pauraque
relations.evidence: In general, it prefers mixed habitat which offers densely vegetated hiding places – ideally forest – for the day, as well as open landscape – perhaps even rivers or wetlands – to hunt at night
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。
